epigraph.quote: walk along footpaths through woods & fields & country estates

moments.quote: We stopped in Oxford for Charles' [illegible].
Arri + I went around Burford shopping - a shawl, jug covers, shaving brush, book.
After supper we are to walk 2½ miles to a pub.
Simon put the van up on a kerb & mended the water tank straps.
